name: Beam Therapeutics Inc.
business: The company is a biotechnology company committed to establishing a fully integrated platform for precision genetic medicines. It develops base editing therapies for serious diseases, including hematological disorders and genetic diseases. The company has not yet generated product revenue and relies on collaborations and financing.
sellsTo: patients with glycogen storage disease Ia

exposures.sentence: We are a biotechnology company committed to establishing the leading, fully integrated platform for precision genetic medicines.

catalysts.sentence: We expect to submit a BLA for risto-cel as early as year-end 2026.

catalysts.event: Complete dosing in Phase 1 trial of BEAM-103
catalysts.sentence: We expect to complete dosing in the trial in the first half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Share updated clinical data for BEAM-302
catalysts.sentence: Updated clinical data from the dose-escalation portions of Part A and Part B are expected to be shared in the first quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Report initial data from BEAM-301 trial
catalysts.sentence: We expect to report initial data from the trial in 2026.
In 2026, we plan to submit a regulatory application for authorization to initiate an open-label, dose-ascending, Phase 1/2 trial of BEAM-304 in PKU patients with the R408W mutation.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 100,000 individuals in the United States have two copies of the Z allele for alpha-1 antitrypsin deficiency.
tamClaims.sentence: It is estimated that approximately 100,000 individuals in the United States have two copies of the Z allele.
